title: Delicate Spring Spanish Ume Plum Tapas Platter
description: A savory and springy Spanish dish featuring ume-plum, perfect for a crowd, served in a kazan cauldron. This dish is sugar-free friendly and showcases the unique flavor of ume-plum.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the diced ume-plum, crumbled manchego cheese, and chopped fresh mint.
Arrange the prosciutto slices in the bottom of a kazan cauldron.
Spoon the ume-plum mixture over the prosciutto.
Drizzle the coconut cream over the top of the ume-plum mixture.
Sprinkle the salt and pepper to taste.
Drizzle the lemon juice and olive oil over the top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional fresh mint if desired.
